compiled_state.title: test isolation: ms_is_merge_in_progress called without cd to temp repo may miss MERGE_HEAD==HEAD guard in test fixtures
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Found while writing test-merge-state-golden-path.sh. ms_is_merge_in_progress calls git rev-parse HEAD without --git-dir, so if a test calls it without first cd-ing into the temp repo, the ambient worktree HEAD is used. This means the MERGE_HEAD==HEAD guard comparison uses mismatched SHAs (temp HEAD vs worktree HEAD) and the guard never fires. Affects any test verifying the self-referencing MERGE_HEAD guard via ms_is_merge_in_progress directly. Fixed in golden-path tests (S5-C1, S5-C6, S5-C7) by using (cd "$repo" && ...) subshell. Check test-merge-state.sh test_merge_head_equals_head_guard_skips_filtering — it avoids the issue by calling ms_get_worktree_only_files (which does cd), but tests of ms_is_merge_in_progress directly are at risk.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All test files calling ms_is_merge_in_progress use cd subshells to ensure correct repo context
- [ ] Verify: grep -rn 'ms_is_merge_in_progress' tests/ shows all calls are inside (cd "$repo" && ...) or equivalent
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Starting fix. Identified 2 calls in test-merge-state.sh (lines 236, 252) that call ms_is_merge_in_progress without cd-ing into temp repo. Lines 236 and 252 use _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR override but no cd subshell. The golden-path tests (S5-C1, S5-C6, S5-C7) already use (cd "$repo" && ...) correctly. Fixing test-merge-state.sh now.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT COMPLETE: Fixed 2 calls in tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh. test_is_merge_in_progress_detects_merge_head (line 236) and test_is_merge_in_progress_returns_false_when_no_merge (line 252) both wrapped with (cd "$merge_repo" ...) and (cd "$clean_repo" ...) subshells respectively. All 15 tests pass (30 assertions). Golden-path tests (57 assertions) unaffected.
comments.author: Test
